en.title: Early Pressure
en.description: Strong early game but failed to secure the soul due to poor smite fight conditions.

fr.title: Pression Early
fr.description: Début de partie solide mais échec de récupération de l'âme à cause de mauvaises conditions de smite.

ko.title: 초반 압박
ko.description: 강력한 초반 운영이었으나 스마이트 싸움 조건 불리로 소울 확보 실패.
